grant_title: Sea Grant gets $10.4M for Long Island Sound research
geographic_restrictions: Long Island Sound region (Connecticut and New York)
project_area: Long Island Sound ecosystem management, including fish species, shellfish, water quality, and salt marsh restoration
demographic_requirements: None specified; open to research institutions and scientists
eligibility_summary: Open to research institutions and scientists at five institutions, including Stony Brook University, for projects improving understanding of Long Island Sound's ecological factors and management.
